body:
Remove specialised use of z_interior (Reasonable for "flat" configurations, unreasonable otherwise).
z_{interior} in the expression for exchange coefficients is appropriate if the surface elevation is zero. 
The general expression for bulk formula coefficients should be evaluated with the local `dz` taken into account.
title: Fix exchange coefficient expression in vertical diffusion tendency.

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This PR fixes bugs in the `wfact!` function, both of which only become relevant when using topography. It also removes some unused code from `wfact!`, updates the code comments, and makes some other minor cosmetic changes.

Closes #1670 
## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
- Take the correct derivative of `vertical_transport!` with respect to `u₃_data`, accounting for the fact that `∂(u³_data)/∂(u₃_data) = g³³`.
- Take the correct derivative of kinetic energy with respect to `u₃_data`, accounting for the derivative of the `dot(CT123(ᶜuₕ), ᶜinterp(C123(ᶠu₃)))` cross term.
- Remove the `∂ᶠ𝕄ₜ∂ᶜρ_mode` Jacobian flag, since have never used Oswald's `gradΦ_shenanigans` approximation.
- Format the `Wfact!` function so that it looks more similar to the `implicit_tendency!` function, and make sure that it uses the type-stable `matching_subfields` function.
- Update all of the Jacobian block derivations in the code comments to reflect the current implicit tendency. Replace `w` with `u₃` in all code comments. Rename the variable `∂ᶜK∂ᶠw_data` to `∂ᶜK∂ᶠu₃_data`, and rename the function `vertical_transport_jac!` to `set_∂ᶜρχₜ∂ᶠu₃!`.
- Decrease the `dt`s for two of the SSP longruns because they appear to be crashing due to (hopefully) unrelated numerical issues.

title: Fix topography bugs in implicit solver
